## Everything you need to know to increase checkout rates.

### How does Iterable help bridge the gap between my online and physical stores? +

Iterable acts as a unified engine that seamlessly connects digital storefront activity with in store Point-of-Sale (POS) data. By ingesting real-time behavioral data from both realms, you can trigger omni-channel moments – such as sending a “thank you” email after an in-store pickup or a push notification when a customer enters a geofenced location

### Can Iterable’s infrastructure handle massive traffic spikes during Black Friday and Cyber Monday? +

Yes. Iterable is a cloud-native platform engineered for enterprise scale, proven to power over one trillion interactions globally. It provides high-volume messages throughput and enterprise deliverability to ensure your complex cross-channel automations and cart abandonment flows perform flawlessly without downtime during your highest-stakes sales events. 

### How does ‘Explainable AI’ differ from other black-box marketing algorithms? +

Unlike opaque competitors, Iterable’s explainable AI operates as a “reasoning partner” that provides transparent insights into why every automated decision was made. Marketers maintain complete control by defining brand-safety guardrails, ensuring that AI-driven product recommendations and merchandising strategies always align with live inventory and brand standards. 

### How does Agentic Intelligence reduce the manual workload for my marketing team?+

In the Agentic Era, growth is often capped by the number of manual decisions a team can make. Iterable’s Nova Journey and Copy agents act as autonomous partners that turn strategic intent into sophisticated workflows. This allows your team to stop building every individual step and start directing high-level strategy, while the AI handles millions of micro-decisions across the lifecycle.
